requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — PSE Certification under DENAN (Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——依据电气用品安全法（DENAN）的PSE认证
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——依據電氣用品安全法（DENAN）的PSE認證

summary.en: EV charging equipment (EVSE) sold or used in Japan must comply with the Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act (電気用品安全法, DENAN). EV charging stations are classified as 'specified electrical appliances and materials' (特定電気用品) subject to mandatory third-party certification by a METI-registered Designated Examination Body (登録検査機関). Manufacturers or importers must obtain a conformity certificate from a Designated Examination Body, maintain technical documents, and affix the PSE diamond mark (〈PSE〉) before placing the product on the Japanese market. The applicable safety standard is JIS C 61851-1 (equivalent to IEC 61851-1) for general EV conductive charging systems.
summary.zh: 在日本销售或使用的电动汽车充电设备（EVSE）须符合《电气用品安全法》（DENAN）。电动汽车充电站被归类为「特定电气用品」，须经由经济产业省（METI）登录的指定检查机构进行强制第三方认证。制造商或进口商须从指定检查机构取得合格证书、维护技术文件，并在产品投放日本市场前加贴PSE菱形标志（〈PSE〉）。适用安全标准为JIS C 61851-1（等同于IEC 61851-1，适用于电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求）。
summary.zht: 在日本銷售或使用的電動汽車充電設備（EVSE）須符合《電氣用品安全法》（DENAN）。電動汽車充電站被歸類為「特定電氣用品」，須經由經濟產業省（METI）登錄的指定檢查機構進行強制第三方認證。製造商或進口商須從指定檢查機構取得合格證書、維護技術文件，並在產品投放日本市場前加貼PSE菱形標誌（〈PSE〉）。適用安全標準為JIS C 61851-1（等同於IEC 61851-1，適用於電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求）。

standards_or_laws: 電気用品安全法 (Electrical Appliance and Material Safety Act, DENAN) — Law No. 234 of 1961, as amended
JIS C 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (IDT IEC 61851-1)

summary.en: China's primary equivalent is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements), technically aligned with IEC 61851-1 but incorporating national deviations. EV chargers in China are subject to mandatory CCC (China Compulsory Certification) from 1 March 2025 under CNCA-C25-01:2024. Chinese CCC test reports and certificates are not recognised under the Japanese PSE/DENAN pathway; separate testing by a METI-registered Designated Examination Body is required.
summary.zh: 中国主要对应标准为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统——第1部分：通用要求），技术上与IEC 61851-1相关，但含有国家偏差。自2025年3月1日起，中国电动汽车充电设备依据CNCA-C25-01:2024实施强制性CCC认证。中国CCC检测报告及证书不被日本PSE/DENAN路径认可，须由经METI登录的指定检查机构单独完成检测。
summary.zht: 中國主要對應標準為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第1部分：通用要求），技術上與IEC 61851-1相關，但含有國家偏差。自2025年3月1日起，中國電動汽車充電設備依據CNCA-C25-01:2024實施強制性CCC認證。中國CCC檢測報告及證書不被日本PSE/DENAN路徑認可，須由經METI登錄的指定檢查機構單獨完成檢測。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (SAMR/SAC)
CNCA-C25-01:2024 — China Compulsory Certification rules for EV charging equipment (mandatory from 1 March 2025)

gap.en: The PSE diamond mark requires mandatory third-party certification by a METI-registered Designated Examination Body — self-declaration is not permitted for specified electrical appliances. Chinese CCC certificates and test reports are not recognised. Products must be re-tested to JIS C 61851-1 by a registered body. The importer or Japan-based responsible entity (輸入業者 or 届出事業者) must be registered with METI. Japanese-language instruction manuals and labelling are required. Voltage compatibility is an additional concern: Japan operates at 100 V / 200 V single-phase, whereas Chinese EVSE is typically designed for 220 V (single-phase) or 380 V (three-phase) — hardware adaptation of power supply components is normally required.
gap.zh: PSE菱形标志要求由经METI登录的指定检查机构进行强制第三方认证，特定电气用品不允许自我声明。中国CCC证书及检测报告不被认可。产品须由登录机构按JIS C 61851-1重新检测。进口商或日本境内责任主体（输入业者或申报事业者）须向METI登记注册。须提供日语说明书及标识。电压兼容性是额外关注点：日本采用100V/200V单相供电，而中国EVSE通常为220V（单相）或380V（三相）设计，通常需要对电源组件进行硬件适配。
gap.zht: PSE菱形標誌要求由經METI登錄的指定檢查機構進行強制第三方認證，特定電氣用品不允許自我聲明。中國CCC證書及檢測報告不被認可。產品須由登錄機構按JIS C 61851-1重新檢測。進口商或日本境內責任主體（輸入業者或申報事業者）須向METI登記註冊。須提供日語說明書及標識。電壓相容性是額外關注點：日本採用100V/200V單相供電，而中國EVSE通常為220V（單相）或380V（三相）設計，通常需要對電源組件進行硬體適配。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PSE diamond mark required before Japan market placement under DENAN (specified electrical appliances category); third-party certification by Designated Examination Body is compulsory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market from 1 March 2025 — CCC under CNCA-C25-01:2024; GB/T 18487.1 compliance required

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PSE diamond mark is mandatory for EV charging equipment in Japan under DENAN. Third-party certification by a METI-registered Designated Examination Body is legally required — self-declaration as used in some other markets is not permitted. Chinese CCC certification does not satisfy this requirement. Hardware adaptation for Japan's 100/200 V grid is typically also required.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】依据DENAN，PSE菱形标志对日本电动汽车充电设备为强制要求。法律上须由经METI登录的指定检查机构进行第三方认证，不允许采用某些其他市场所采用的自我声明方式。中国CCC认证不满足此要求。通常还需针对日本100/200V电网进行硬件适配。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】依據DENAN，PSE菱形標誌對日本電動汽車充電設備為強制要求。法律上須由經METI登錄的指定檢查機構進行第三方認證，不允許採用某些其他市場所採用的自我聲明方式。中國CCC認證不滿足此要求。通常還需針對日本100/200V電網進行硬體適配。

requirement_topic.en: DC Charging Station Safety — JIS C 61851-23 and DENAN
requirement_topic.zh: 直流充电站安全——JIS C 61851-23与DENAN
requirement_topic.zht: 直流充電站安全——JIS C 61851-23與DENAN

summary.en: DC off-board EV charging stations (Mode 4) in Japan must comply with JIS C 61851-23 (equivalent to IEC 61851-23), which specifies requirements for DC EV charging stations. Under DENAN, DC fast chargers are classified as specified electrical appliances requiring PSE diamond certification. The applicable communication protocol standard for CHAdeMO DC fast charging is the CHAdeMO Association protocol specification, distinct from both the Chinese GB/T 27930 (CAN-bus) and European ISO 15118 (PLC-based) protocols. JIS standards are issued by the Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC).
summary.zh: 日本直流非车载电动汽车充电站（模式4）须符合JIS C 61851-23（等同于IEC 61851-23），该标准规定了直流电动汽车充电站的要求。依据DENAN，直流快充站被列为特定电气用品，须取得PSE菱形认证。CHAdeMO直流快充适用的通信协议标准为CHAdeMO协议会协议规范，有别于中国GB/T 27930（CAN总线）和欧洲ISO 15118（电力线通信）协议。JIS标准由日本工业标准调查会（JISC）颁布。
summary.zht: 日本直流非車載電動汽車充電站（模式4）須符合JIS C 61851-23（等同於IEC 61851-23），該標準規定了直流電動汽車充電站的要求。依據DENAN，直流快充站被列為特定電氣用品，須取得PSE菱形認證。CHAdeMO直流快充適用的通訊協定標準為CHAdeMO協議會協議規範，有別於中國GB/T 27930（CAN總線）和歐洲ISO 15118（電力線通訊）協定。JIS標準由日本工業標準調查會（JISC）頒布。

standards_or_laws: JIS C 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC EV charging station (IDT IEC 61851-23)
CHAdeMO Association DC fast-charging protocol specification
電気用品安全法 (DENAN) — Law No. 234 of 1961, as amended

summary.en: China's DC charging system standard is GB/T 18487.5-2024 (DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3 connector) and the communication protocol is GB/T 27930 (CAN-bus based). These are technically and physically incompatible with CHAdeMO: different connector geometry, different pin assignments, different communication protocol (CAN vs. CHAdeMO's own protocol). Chinese CCC certification for DC chargers under CNCA-C25-01:2024 does not satisfy Japanese DENAN PSE requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电系统标准为GB/T 18487.5-2024（适用于GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充电系统），通信协议为GB/T 27930（基于CAN总线）。这些标准与CHAdeMO在技术和物理层面均不兼容：接口几何形状、引脚分配及通信协议（CAN与CHAdeMO专有协议）均不相同。依据CNCA-C25-01:2024的直流充电设备CCC认证不满足日本DENAN PSE要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電系統標準為GB/T 18487.5-2024（適用於GB/T 20234.3接口的直流充電系統），通訊協定為GB/T 27930（基於CAN總線）。這些標準與CHAdeMO在技術和物理層面均不相容：接口幾何形狀、引腳分配及通訊協定（CAN與CHAdeMO專有協定）均不相同。依據CNCA-C25-01:2024的直流充電設備CCC認證不滿足日本DENAN PSE要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.5-2024 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 5: DC charging system for GB/T 20234.3
GB/T 27930-2015 — Communication protocol between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicle (CAN-bus)

gap.en: DC fast chargers for Japan require: (1) PSE diamond certification under DENAN by a Designated Examination Body tested to JIS C 61851-23; (2) CHAdeMO connector hardware (physically incompatible with China GB/T 20234.3 — full hardware redesign required); (3) CHAdeMO communication protocol support (incompatible with GB/T 27930); (4) Voltage/current compliance for Japan's grid. Chinese GB/T DC fast charger hardware cannot be used in Japan without hardware redesign of both the connector and the communication stack. Note: CHAdeMO market share in Japan is declining as Japanese automakers have adopted NACS/CCS in some new models (as of 2026), but CHAdeMO remains the dominant legacy DC standard and is required for backward compatibility with the existing Japanese EV fleet.
gap.zh: 日本直流快充站须满足：（1）依据DENAN由指定检查机构按JIS C 61851-23检测并取得PSE菱形认证；（2）CHAdeMO接口硬件（与中国GB/T 20234.3物理不兼容，须完全重新设计硬件）；（3）支持CHAdeMO通信协议（与GB/T 27930不兼容）；（4）符合日本电网的电压/电流要求。中国GB/T直流快充硬件在接口和通信协议栈未经重新设计的情况下无法在日本使用。注意：截至2026年，随着日本汽车制造商在部分新车型中采用NACS/CCS，CHAdeMO在日本的市场份额有所下降，但CHAdeMO仍是主要的传统直流标准，并因与现有日本电动汽车车队的向后兼容性而被要求支持。
gap.zht: 日本直流快充站須滿足：（1）依據DENAN由指定檢查機構按JIS C 61851-23檢測並取得PSE菱形認證；（2）CHAdeMO接口硬件（與中國GB/T 20234.3物理不相容，須完全重新設計硬件）；（3）支持CHAdeMO通訊協定（與GB/T 27930不相容）；（4）符合日本電網的電壓/電流要求。中國GB/T直流快充硬件在接口和通訊協定棧未經重新設計的情況下無法在日本使用。注意：截至2026年，隨著日本汽車製造商在部分新車型中採用NACS/CCS，CHAdeMO在日本的市場份額有所下降，但CHAdeMO仍是主要的傳統直流標準，並因與現有日本電動汽車車隊的向後相容性而被要求支持。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PSE diamond mark required under DENAN; CHAdeMO connector is the dominant DC standard for Japan's existing EV fleet; JIS C 61851-23 is the applicable safety standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory from 1 March 2025 — CCC under CNCA-C25-01:2024; GB/T 18487.5 and GB/T 27930 compliance required for CN domestic market

source.publisher: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI), Japan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DC fast chargers for Japan require PSE diamond certification and CHAdeMO connector/protocol support. Chinese GB/T 20234.3 DC connectors are physically incompatible with CHAdeMO; GB/T 27930 protocol is incompatible with CHAdeMO communication. Hardware redesign of the connector and communication stack is required before Japan market entry, in addition to DENAN third-party certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】日本直流快充站须取得PSE菱形认证并支持CHAdeMO接口/协议。中国GB/T 20234.3直流接口与CHAdeMO物理不兼容；GB/T 27930协议与CHAdeMO通信不兼容。进入日本市场前，除DENAN第三方认证外，还须对接口和通信协议栈进行硬件重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】日本直流快充站須取得PSE菱形認證並支持CHAdeMO接口/協定。中國GB/T 20234.3直流接口與CHAdeMO物理不相容；GB/T 27930協定與CHAdeMO通訊不相容。進入日本市場前，除DENAN第三方認證外，還須對接口和通訊協定棧進行硬件重新設計。
